Dragon Ball Z inspired base
LED Illuminated effect parts
One (1) Dragon Ball Z logo stand [BONUS PART]

Brands : Prime 1 Studio

Collection : Mega Premium Masterline

Series : Dragon Ball

Scale : 1/4 Scale

Product Code :

MPMDBZ-03S

Product Size Approx. :H:61cm W:43cm D:34cm
Package Weight Approx. : About 13.9 kg

Materials : Polystone and other materials :

&nbsp;

&nbsp;

&nbsp;

Notice:
Prototype samples shown.
Product details could be subject to change without further notice.
Please note the final product specifications may differ because each product is Handmade.
Since the product is still in the development stage, the Size (up to 10%) &amp; Weight (up to 10kg) may be changed during the production stage.

Note: Due to the size of the item, additional shipping charges may apply. In addition to its location, the actual size and weight of the package are used to determine these costs. Both are unknown at this time and may not be available until the product arrives in our storage.

&nbsp;

ⒸBIRD STUDIO/SHUEISHA, TOEI ANIMATION

&nbsp;

products.name: MOSHOWTOYS - Takeda Shingen (Illustrious Class)
products.description:
From the MOSHOWTOYS original work "PROGENITOR EFFECT" comes the first original armored model MCT J02 The Tiger of Kai Takeda Shingen based on the Sengoku warlord Takeda Shingen!

The model features articulated joints with a wide range of articulation, making it easy to create all kinds of poses. The model is made of ABS, PVC, POM and metal alloy. Add one to your collection and experience the intense Sengoku action for yourself!

products.description:
Bandai BN Head Collection Vol.2 Mobile Suit Gundam ZGMF-X20A Strike Freedom Gundam Head Sculpt



Product Features

 	20.87H x 23.23W inches (53cm x 59cm)
 	Made of plastic and other materials
 	Based on the Mobile Suit Gundam SEED Destiny anime
 	Part of the BN Head Collection series
 	Features LED light-up eyes
 	Highly detailed
 	Requires 3 AA batteries (Not included)







Box Contents

 	Base

products.name: CCS - Great Mazinkaiser
BNFDX - Gundam VS Zaku Statue  (Limited)
products.description:
The statue features the RX-78-2 Gundam piercing Denim's Zaku II as seen in the anime. It is also presented on a piece of colony, creating a platform for the figures and detailed with special effect parts to give some dynamic feel to the scenery.



Both of the Gundam and Zaku models are redesigned and treated with more mechanical modern aesthetics compare to its anime version.





Height 450mm (17.7 inches)

Width: 400mm (15.7 inches)

Depth: 300mm (11.8 inches)

products.name: Soul of Chogokin - XVX-016 Gundam Aerial
CCS - Shin Getter 1 (Black ver.) Limited Edition
products.description:
From CCS Toys comes a nearly 10-inch tall figure of Shin Getter 1 from Getter Robo Armageddon. The figure features a pair of wings as well as several weapon accessories. Limited edition black version!













Product Features



 	10 inches (24.8cm)

 	Made of ABS and die-cast

 	Based on the Getter Robo Armageddon anime

 	Fully articulated

 	LED lighting effects















Box Contents



 	Shin Getter 1 figure

 	Pair of wings

 	6 Pairs of hands

 	2 Axes

 	Large Blaster

 	Small blaster

 	Drum magazine

 	Revolver

 	Knife

 	Chain weapon

 	2 Alternate wrist blades

 	3 Red effect parts

 	2 Supports struts

 	Stand

 	Stand joint parts

Product Features



 	9.25 inches (23.5cm)

 	Made of plastic and alloy

 	Based on the Tengen Toppa Gurren Lagann anime

 	Highly articulated

 	Includes several accessories for added customization















Box Contents

 	Effect parts

 	Alternate hands

 	Base
